name: Trust Auditor
description: Agent handoff gate (A2A): allow/deny/review before delegating to another agent or releasing funds—identity signals, behavioral history from your transaction log, structured evidence, optional AP2-style billing. Decision-support, not guarantees.

extensions.description: Per-verification and subscription billing via AP2-style gateway (see docs/PAYMENTS_INTEGRATION.md in repo).

skills.name: Identity Check
skills.description: Identity signals for the handoff gate: agent id validation and optional multi-registry quorum.

skills.name: Reputation Audit
skills.description: Full handoff audit: identity + behavioral history → trust score, APPROVED/FLAGGED/REVIEW_REQUIRED, warnings, evidence payload.
